blended.narrative: Le Massif is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 84 ft. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Saturday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 20°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
